proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=97, 93.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +41.1pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8690 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)

Portfolio is heavily concentrated in UP_TRI (33/35) and 100% Choppy; if regime flips back to Bear, the dormant cohort activates and could rapidly compound UP_TRI signal concentration via TAKE_SMALL sizing on new entries
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=97, wr=93.7%, edge +41.1pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=97, Wilson lower 0.869, +41.1pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61 below the Tier S threshold. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 6) so the cohort is dormant and the 100% Choppy concentration on 35 open positions is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-22) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: BULL_PROXY × Bear: n=17, 88.2% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=BULL_PROXY, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +29.5pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.98 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Sample size n=17 is modest; a single losing cluster could shift Wilson lower toward the Tier M floor on next archive comparison
R-multiple 0.98 is close to 1.0 threshold and under D-8 Day-6 forced-exit review per project_anchor §7 — promotion ceiling should remain Tier M until D-8 resolves
approval would propagate redundant to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +29.5pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +29.5pp edge over BULL_PROXY baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.98 (<1.0). Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 6), so the cohort is dormant; portfolio concentration trigger is on Choppy (100%) and a Bear-gated BULL_PROXY promotion does not compound it and may diversify when Bear re-emerges. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-06-19 through 06-22) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector = Choppy regime (100%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank and UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cells (20% each); UP_TRI signal type (94.3%) (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector = Choppy regime (100%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank and UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cells (20% each); UP_TRI signal type (94.3%); recommended action: Pause new entries in sector=Bank and sector=Pharma until at least one position naturally exits (Day 6) and cell share drops below 0.18. Additionally, block any new UP_TRI entries until signal-type share falls below 0.85 OR cohort_health upgrades Choppy×UP_TRI to Tier M.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 35-position long book simultaneously with no statistical justification (cohort still Candidate). Bank and Pharma sector clusters would amplify drawdown via correlated sector beta — single-day gap risk on the two concentrated cells is ~40% of book.

evidence: UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell at 0.20 share (7/35) — at the 0.20 cell threshold
UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell at 0.20 share (7/35) — at the 0.20 cell threshold
UP_TRI×Choppy×FMCG cell at 0.1714 share (6/35) — just below threshold but adds clustering
UP_TRI dominates signal mix at 33/35 = 94.3%, above 0.85 threshold
Book is fully directional long (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY = 35/35)
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort only at Candidate tier (n=238) — unvalidated edge
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Choppy regime (100%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank and UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cells (20% each); UP_TRI signal type (94.3%)
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in sector=Bank and sector=Pharma until at least one position naturally exits (Day 6) and cell share drops below 0.18. Additionally, block any new UP_TRI entries until signal-type share falls below 0.85 OR cohort_health upgrades Choppy×UP_TRI to Tier M.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 35-position long book simultaneously with no statistical justification (cohort still Candidate). Bank and Pharma sector clusters would amplify drawdown via correlated sector beta — single-day gap risk on the two concentrated cells is ~40% of book.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (observed 1.0, above 0.80 threshold) AND two cells breach the 0.20 cell threshold: UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank and UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma both at 20% (7 of 35 positions each). UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 33/35 = 94.3% (above 0.85 threshold) with the book fully directional long. Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=238) — unvalidated edge across all concentration cells.
